entries.source: Ask for subject, level, time limit, and question types if missing.
entries.value: Tanya untuk subjek, level, time limit, dan soalan types jika hilang.

entries.source: Ask for subjects, deadlines, resources, and pain points.
entries.value: Tanya untuk subjek, deadlines, resources, dan pain points.

entries.source: Ask for subjects, time spent, wins, misses, and upcoming deadlines.
entries.value: Tanya untuk subjek, time spent, wins, misses, dan upcoming deadlines.

entries.source: Ask for the data, context, and question being answered.
entries.value: Tanya untuk data, context, dan soalan sedang answered.

entries.source: Ask for the diagram parts or subject, then generate a label list and practice round.
entries.value: Tanya untuk diagram parts atau subjek, then generate label list dan practice round.

entries.source: Ask for the habit, current obstacle, and easiest starting version.
entries.value: Tanya untuk habit, current obstacle, dan easiest starting version.

entries.source: Ask for the learning context and behaviors worth rewarding.
entries.value: Tanya untuk pembelajaran context dan behaviors worth rewarding.

entries.source: Ask for the note set, subject, and desired organization style.
entries.value: Tanya untuk note set, subjek, dan desired organization style.

entries.source: Ask for the one highest-impact revision priority, then rewrite the paragraph yourself.
entries.value: Tanya untuk one highest-impact revision priority, then rewrite paragraph yourself.

entries.source: Ask for the passage or title and the learner's goal.
entries.value: Tanya untuk passage atau title dan pelajar's goal.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: Tanya untuk prerequisite ideas, plain-language model, one contoh, one practice task, dan one way untuk uji understanding.

entries.source: Ask for the question, learner answer, and expected answer if any part is missing.
entries.value: Tanya untuk soalan, pelajar jawapan, dan expected jawapan jika any part ialah hilang.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest explanation or next experiment.
entries.value: Tanya untuk paling kecil explanation atau seterusnya experiment.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest hint or a check on your attempted step.
entries.value: Tanya untuk paling kecil hint atau semak di anda attempted step.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest useful hint
entries.value: Tanya untuk paling kecil berguna hint

entries.source: Ask for the source text, claim, author, date, and context if missing.
entries.value: Tanya untuk source text, dakwaan, author, date, dan context jika hilang.

entries.source: Ask for the study block length and suggest a break rhythm.
entries.value: Tanya untuk belajar block length dan suggest break rhythm.

entries.source: Ask for the task, target duration, and completion criteria.
entries.value: Tanya untuk task, target duration, dan completion criteria.

entries.source: Ask for the text and desired length if missing.
entries.value: Tanya untuk text dan desired length jika hilang.

entries.source: Ask for the topic and which side the learner wants; take the opposite side.
entries.value: Tanya untuk topik dan yang mana side pelajar wants; take opposite side.

entries.source: Ask for the topic in plain language, then request one analogy, one example, and one common misconception.
entries.value: Minta topik dalam bahasa mudah, kemudian minta satu analogi, satu contoh, dan satu salah faham biasa.

entries.source: Ask for the topic, context, what they tried, and desired help.
entries.value: Tanya untuk topik, context, apa mereka tried, dan desired bantu.

entries.source: Ask for the visible text, labels, and the learner's question if the image is not attached.
entries.value: Tanya untuk kelihatan text, labels, dan pelajar's soalan jika image bukan attached.

entries.source: Ask for topic and purpose, then propose the central node and first branches.
entries.value: Tanya untuk topik dan purpose, then propose central node dan pertama branches.

entries.source: Ask for topic and scope, then propose a first map structure.
entries.value: Tanya untuk topik dan scope, then propose pertama peta structure.

entries.source: Ask for topic, age/level, and tone; then create a short story setup.
entries.value: Tanya untuk topik, age/level, dan tone; then cipta ringkas story setup.

entries.source: Ask for topic, duration, level, and scoring preference.
entries.value: Tanya untuk topik, duration, level, dan scoring preference.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, and examiner style; then begin with a warm-up question.
entries.value: Tanya untuk topik, level, dan examiner style; then begin dengan warm-up soalan.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, and preferred game vibe; then create the first quest.
entries.value: Tanya untuk topik, level, dan preferred game vibe; then cipta pertama quest.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, exam date, and source material if needed.
entries.value: Tanya untuk topik, level, exam date, dan bahan sumber jika needed.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, question types, and number of items.
entries.value: Minta topik, tahap, jenis soalan, dan bilangan item.

entries.source: Ask group size, topic, time, and desired outcome.
entries.value: Tanya group size, topik, time, dan desired outcome.

entries.source: Ask instrument/level if relevant, then teach one small concept.
entries.value: Tanya instrument/tahap if relevant, then teach one kecil konsep.

entries.source: Ask interests, constraints, and curiosity level before recommending paths.
entries.value: Tanya interests, constraints, dan curiosity level sebelum recommending laluan.

entries.source: Ask me five Socratic questions about this topic. After each answer, tell me what assumption I used and what to test next.
entries.value: Tanya saya lima soalan Sokratik tentang topik ini. Selepas setiap jawapan, beritahu andaian yang saya gunakan dan perkara seterusnya untuk diuji.

entries.source: Ask me one check question
entries.value: Tanya saya one semak soalan

entries.source: Ask me questions about this poem
entries.value: Tanya saya soalan tentang puisi ini

entries.source: Ask me thesis defense questions
entries.value: Tanya saya soalan pembelaan tesis

entries.source: Ask one focused diagnostic question quickly. Convert the learner's target into a mastery target internally, then start with a simple question that reveals their mental model.
entries.value: Tanya one berfokus diagnostic soalan quickly. Convert pelajar's target menjadi mastery target internally, then mula dengan mudah soalan itu reveals mereka mental model.

entries.source: Ask one sharp goal question, infer sensible defaults, then create a compact learning map with a try-first activity.
entries.value: Tanya one sharp goal soalan, infer sensible defaults, then cipta compact pembelajaran peta dengan try-pertama activity.

entries.source: Ask predictions, reveal consequences, adjust variables, and summarize principles.
entries.value: Tanya predictions, reveal consequences, adjust variables, dan ringkaskan principles.

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Ajukan soalan, cabar idea, dan pelajari sejarah melalui perbualan berasaskan fakta dengan tokoh awam dari masa lalu.

entries.source: Ask Socratic Instruction to find the weak link.
entries.value: Tanya Arahan Sokratik untuk find lemah pautan.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check that step.
entries.value: Tanya AI untuk semak itu step.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Minta AI menyemak penaakulan anda, bukan hanya hasilnya.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning.
entries.value: Tanya AI untuk semak anda penaakulan.

entries.source: Ask the AI to label uncertainty.
entries.value: Tanya AI untuk label uncertainty.

entries.source: Ask the historical mode to label what is documented, inferred, or simulated.
entries.value: Minta mod sejarah melabelkan perkara yang didokumenkan, disimpulkan, atau disimulasikan.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain the topic in plain language first.
entries.value: Tanya pelajar untuk jelaskan topik dalam plain language pertama.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: Tanya pelajar untuk jelaskan apa changed selepas each hint.

entries.source: Ask the learner to state their current belief, then test it with a small example.
entries.value: Tanya pelajar untuk state mereka current belief, then uji ia dengan kecil contoh.

entries.source: Ask the real question
entries.value: Tanya soalan sebenar

entries.source: Ask what a different side would claim.
entries.value: Tanya apa different side akan dakwaan.

entries.source: Ask what a different side, class, era, or source might say.
entries.value: Tanya apa different side, class, era, atau source mungkin say.

entries.source: Ask what data or observations they have and what decision they need.
entries.value: Tanya apa data atau observations mereka mempunyai dan apa decision mereka memerlukan.

entries.source: Ask what happened, what they felt, and what they want to improve.
entries.value: Tanya apa happened, apa mereka felt, dan apa mereka want untuk perbaik.

entries.source: Ask what must be remembered and what familiar place the learner wants to use.
entries.value: Tanya apa mesti menjadi remembered dan apa familiar place pelajar wants untuk use.

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to be quizzed on if the topic is missing.
entries.value: Tanya apa pelajar wants untuk menjadi quizzed di jika topik ialah hilang.

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to represent, then propose a simple visual layout.
entries.value: Tanya apa pelajar wants untuk represent, then propose mudah visual layout.

entries.source: Ask what the resource is, audience, and what context they need.
entries.value: Tanya apa resource ialah, audience, dan apa context mereka memerlukan.

entries.source: Ask what they are doing and suggest a low-distraction sound preset.
entries.value: Tanya apa mereka ialah doing dan suggest low-distraction sound preset.

entries.source: Ask what they have tried, then give a hint or worked miniature example.
entries.value: Tanya apa mereka mempunyai tried, then give hint atau worked miniature contoh.

entries.source: Ask your first question and move straight into practice.
entries.value: Tanya anda pertama soalan dan move straight menjadi practice.

entries.source: Ask, evaluate, improve with structure, and retry.
entries.value: Tanya, nilai, perbaik dengan structure, dan retry.

entries.source: Assessment
entries.value: Penilaian

entries.value: Assign XP, levels, quests, dan reflection checkpoints.

entries.source: At Inspir, our mission is to democratize learning by making it accessible, engaging, and enjoyable for all. We believe that everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of their background or circumstances. Our platform is designed to provide students with the tools and resources they need to succeed, while also fostering a love of learning. We strive to create a community that is inclusive, supportive, and empowering, where students can connect with each other and with educators from around the world. By making learning fun and accessible, we aim to inspir a generation of lifelong learners who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.
entries.value: Di inspir, misi kami ialah mendemokrasikan pembelajaran dengan menjadikannya mudah dicapai, menarik, dan menyeronokkan untuk semua. Kami percaya setiap orang berhak mendapat pendidikan berkualiti tanpa mengira latar belakang atau keadaan. Platform kami direka untuk memberi pelajar alat dan sumber yang mereka perlukan untuk berjaya sambil memupuk minat belajar. Kami berusaha membina komuniti yang inklusif, menyokong, dan memperkasakan, tempat pelajar boleh berhubung antara satu sama lain dan dengan pendidik di seluruh dunia. Dengan menjadikan pembelajaran menyeronokkan dan mudah dicapai, kami ingin menginspirasikan generasi pelajar sepanjang hayat yang bersedia menghadapi cabaran masa depan.

entries.source: By using our Service, you agree to subscribe to newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information we may send. However, you may opt out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link or by emailing at support@inspir.app
entries.value: Dengan menggunakan Perkhidmatan kami, anda bersetuju untuk melanggan buletin, bahan pemasaran atau promosi, dan maklumat lain yang mungkin kami hantar. Namun, anda boleh menarik diri daripada menerima mana-mana atau semua komunikasi ini dengan mengikuti pautan nyahlanggan atau menghantar e-mel kepada support@inspir.app.

entries.source: BY USING SERVICE OR OTHER SERVICES PROVIDED BY US, YOU ACKNOWLEDGE THAT YOU HAVE READ THESE TERMS OF SERVICE AND AGREE TO BE BOUND BY THEM.

entries.source: CalOPPA is the first state law in the nation to require commercial websites and online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond California to require a person or company in the United States (and conceivable the world) that operates websites collecting personally identifiable information from California consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the information being collected and those individuals with whom it is being shared, and to comply with this policy.
entries.value: CalOPPA ialah pertama state law dalam nation untuk require commercial websites dan dalam talian Perkhidmatan untuk post Dasar Privasi. law’s reach stretches well beyond California untuk require orang atau Syarikat dalam United States (dan conceivable dunia) itu operates websites collecting personally identifiable maklumat daripada California consumers untuk post conspicuous Dasar Privasi di nya laman web stating exactly maklumat sedang collected dan itu individuals dengan whom ia ialah sedang shared, dan untuk comply dengan ini policy.

entries.source: Career Explorer
entries.value: Peneroka Kerjaya

entries.source: career explorer AI
entries.value: Penjelajah Kerjaya AI

entries.source: Career Explorer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore careers through interests, skills, day-in-the-life examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Penjelajah Kerjaya ialah cara berfokus untuk menggunakan AI bagi pembelajaran, bukan mengumpul jawapan secara pasif. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Explore careers melalui interests, skills, day-dalam--life contoh, dan seterusnya steps.

entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Penjelajah Kerjaya: panduan praktikal

entries.source: Case Study Simulator AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Enter a realistic case, make decisions, see consequences, and learn the principle behind each choice.
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Simulator Kajian Kes ialah cara berfokus untuk menggunakan AI bagi pembelajaran, bukan mengumpul jawapan secara pasif. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Enter realistik case, jadikan decisions, see consequences, dan belajar principle behind each choice.
